'''Tyr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]], Tyr was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Because he was raised at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Master Tyr did not worship the [[Quay]] totem that his people who grew up on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] dedicated their lives to following fanatically. Wearing his long black hair in a tight braid, Master Tyr selected the young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Pix (Jedi)|Pix]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].<ref name="JY" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="ERC" /><ref name="Heroes on Both Sides" /> Master Tyr took up the rank of [[Senior Jedi General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and contributed his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to the war effort. Assigned to the [[Battle of Thustra|campaign]] on [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]], Master Tyr and Padawan Pix joined Master [[Tyffix]] and his Padawan, [[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]], in attempting to prevent the [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] from joining the Confederacy. While Masters Tyr and Tyffix were going over strategy with their [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in a battlefield [[Thustra Republic command center|command center]], a suicide bomber attacked their tent. While the two Masters were killed, Master Tyr had successfully [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Push|evacuated]] both Padawans from the tent using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="JY" />

==Powers and abilities==
As a Jedi Master, Tyr was proficient in the use of [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]], demonstrating his skill at the Battle of Thustra when he pushed his Padawan, Pix, out of the command tent before it was engulfed by a suicide bombing. His ability to [[Force sense/Legends|sense]] the imminent danger, as well as act accordingly in time to it, is testament to an aptitude for [[Precognition/Legends|precognition]].
